top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran exchange attacks as Trump threatens further escalation
top_signals.summary: The attacks are the latest development in an exchange of strikes that threaten to reignite a full-scale war, which was paused in April when the two sides agreed to a ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India turns to military to beef up security after exam scandals
top_signals.summary: The government will deploy the Indian Air Force for the first time ever to transport question papers, according to officials familiar with the matter
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Barr, Efficient and Effective Central Banking: Beyond the Balance Sheet
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Money Marketeers of New York University, New York, New York
